def: Devoid of truth; dishonest; dishonest; spurious; faithless.-- Truth"less*ness, n.
The act of stripping off the bark, rind, hull, or outer coat.
One who lives in accordance with prescribed rules for diet; adieter.
The ring of the fruit of several East Indian species of acacia;neb-neb. It contains gallic acid and tannin, and is used for dyeingdrab.
Of or pertaining to the deer, or to the family Cervidæ.
To bequeath, or leave as a legacy. [Obs.] "All I have tobequest." Gascoigne.
A judgment entered against the plaintiff in a suit where hedoes not appear to prosecute. See Nolle prosequi.
The sound of a patient's voice so modified as to resemble thebleating of a goat, heard on applying the ear to the chest in certaindiseases within its cavity, as in pleurisy with effusion.
